Enquiry
Property care · Zadar & islands

Your home on the Adriatic – in the best hands.

Do you own a house or holiday flat around Zadar? We look after it personally – German-speaking, reliable and all year round. From key service to guest care. And if your property is on an island, we come by our own boat.

🇩🇪 German-speaking on site🔑 Key service⚓ Own boat for the islands★ Personal & honest
See our services WhatsApp

Complete care for your property

Everything from one hand
  • Regular checks & key service
  • Guest check-in & check-out
  • Cleaning & laundry
  • Maintenance & small repairs
  • Administration & official errands
Request a quote
Why us

Care as if you were there yourself.

A holiday home in Croatia is a dream – but hard to keep an eye on from afar. We are your hands and eyes on the ground, so your property stays in shape and your guests feel welcome.

🇩🇪

German-speaking contact

Reach us directly – no language barrier. Clear arrangements, reliable feedback, personal contact.

🔑

Key service & checks

We regularly check on things: airing out, running the water, inspecting everything – so nasty surprises don’t arise in the first place.

⚓

Own boat for the islands

Is your property on Ugljan, Pašman, Dugi Otok or another island? We come from Zadar by our own boat – even where others can’t reach.

🤝

Honest & reliable

No mass operation. We look after a manageable number of properties personally – but properly. Transparent arrangements, fair prices.

Zadar & surroundings

Where your Adriatic dream is at home.

From the old town by the sea to the islands offshore – our daily patch, with your property right in the middle.

Services

We take care of everything around your property.

Individually or as complete all-round care – exactly as you need it.

🔑

Key service & property checks

  • Regular visits & checking on things
  • Airing out, running the water, blinds
  • Checks for damp & storm damage
  • Short photo report after every visit
👤

Guest care

  • Guest check-in & check-out
  • Key handover & briefing on site
  • Point of contact during the stay
  • Final check after departure
🧹

Cleaning & laundry

  • Interim & final cleaning
  • Bed linen & towels
  • Freshening up before your own arrival
  • Terrace & outdoor areas
🔧

Maintenance & repairs

  • Keeping systems & tech in shape
  • Small repairs done ourselves
  • Pool, garden & outdoor areas
  • Larger works: coordinating tradespeople
📝

Administration & authorities

  • Post, invoices & meter readings
  • Official errands & local contacts
  • Coordinating service providers
  • Clearly documented & billed
⚓

Island service by boat

  • Care for properties on the islands
  • Arrival by our own boat from Zadar
  • Material & small transports
  • Even hard-to-reach locations
🏷️

And one more thing: doorbell nameplates

We also make custom doorbell nameplates and signage – weatherproof, clean and matching the house. Fitting on site on request.

Not quite what you need? Tell us what you’re after – we’ll find a solution.

Request a tailored quote
How it works

Worry-free in four steps.

  1. Getting to know & enquiry. You tell us about your property and what you need – via WhatsApp, phone or email.
  2. Property visit. We view your house on site and discuss keys, access and any specifics.
  3. Care plan. You receive a clear offer with fixed services and fair prices – no hidden costs.
  4. Ongoing care. We take care of things – and after every visit you get a short report with photos.
📍 Zadar
⚓ Zadar
Your property, our patch

At home between Zadar and the islands.

Whether a city flat in Zadar, a holiday house on the coast or a retreat on one of the islands offshore – we know the region and are quickly on site. That’s exactly our advantage: what is a lengthy journey for others, we reach in no time by our own boat.

🏙️ Zadar & mainland⚓ Ugljan · Pašman🏖️ Dugi Otok & around
Request a quote
Off the coast

Just a boat ride away: Preko, Ugljan & the islands.

Many of the finest properties lie where the road ends. That’s exactly where our own boat takes us – reliably, all year round.

Out on the water too?

Private boat tours & boat rental with a German skipper from Zadar – our sister offering.

To the Skipper site
Home Care Zadar

So your Adriatic dream stays a dream.

From regular checks to complete all-round care – we’re on site so you don’t have to be.
